title: Supply, Fabrication, Inspection, Surface preparation and Painting of Skid Structures for West Coast Project
content:
Project Name: Supply, Fabrication, Inspection, Surface preparation and Painting of Skid Structures for West Coast Project.
Client: AIR LIQUIDE.
Project code: 4020005.
Description: Supply, Fabrication, Inspection, Surface preparation and Painting of Skid Structures (Turbine Booster Skid, Cooler skid and Warm Skid).
Location: Raz Al Khaimah.
Field of activity: Manufacturing Works.
Market sector: Oil & Gas.
Status: Completed 2020.
MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
